data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the seven new ticket CLI subcommands added by this epic.

**Why**: CLAUDE.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, and ticket-cli-reference.md will become stale after S1-S7 land. Future agents need accurate awareness of the new subcommand surface.

**Scope**:
- IN: Update `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` to document all 7 new subcommands (validate, classify, clarity-check, check-ac, quality-check, summary, purge-bridge) with their flags and exit codes; update CLAUDE.md quick reference table if ticket subcommands are listed there; update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md if any new config keys are introduced by the subcommands
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; documenting original standalone scripts (they remain as-is); caller migration docs (Epic e1b2-2653's concern)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, ticket-cli-reference.md documents all 7 new subcommands with their flag surfaces, exit codes, and output formats
  <- Satisfies: ensuring developers can discover and use the new CLI subcommands
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md quick reference table accurately reflects any changes to ticket CLI subcommands if that table existed before this epic
  <- Satisfies: keeping project documentation accurate after epic completion

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: Update project docs to reflect ticket system validation and classification layer
